<a id="class-editorexportplatformpc"></a>

# EditorExportPlatformPC

**Inherits:** [EditorExportPlatform](class_editorexportplatform.md#class-editorexportplatform) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

**Inherited By:** [EditorExportPlatformLinuxBSD](class_editorexportplatformlinuxbsd.md#class-editorexportplatformlinuxbsd), [EditorExportPlatformWindows](class_editorexportplatformwindows.md#class-editorexportplatformwindows)

Base class for the desktop platform exporter (Windows and Linux/BSD).

## Description

The base class for the desktop platform exporters. These include Windows and Linux/BSD, but not macOS. See the classes inheriting from this one for more details.
